/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -O3 -Wall -DCMSIS_MCU_H="<stdint.h>" -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/image.dir/link.d -shared  -o image.so CMakeFiles/image.dir/modules/py_image.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/common/array.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/common/queue.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/common/trace.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/imlib.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/hough.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/fmath.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/edge.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/mathop.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/fast.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/point.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/rectangle.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/collections.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/sincos_tab.c.o CMakeFiles/image.dir/imlib/xyz_tab.c.o  -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.13.so
